user_query: I'm a fashion blogger and I'm looking for the latest fashion trends. Can you help me find information about the earnings trend for Apple Inc.? Also, provide me with the estimated revenue and net income for the company. Additionally, I would like to know the current time in New York City.

TaskList.description: Find the latest earnings trend for Apple Inc.
Retrieve the estimated revenue for Apple Inc.
Retrieve the net income for Apple Inc.
Get the current time in New York City.
